title: nvidiated
description: a very simple and fast modpack using nvidium for optimization.
body:
# A simple performance modpack using nvidium. 
**_Warning!_** this modpack is designed for an nvidia gpu's.

- Nvidium needs Sodium 5.11 to run. any version above or below that version of sodium does not work.

- using a few qol mods like Controlling and Visuality.

### If you get any bugs please send me the crash report in the discord.
